task_completion.description: The Ordinary Least Squares (OLS) model specification dialog is opened in Gretl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window titled 'gretl: model specification' or 'Ordinary Least Squares' is visible.

task_completion.description: The 'food_exp' variable is selected as the dependent variable.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the model specification dialog, 'food_exp' is placed in the 'Dependent variable' box.

task_completion.description: The 'income' variable is selected as an independent variable/regressor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the model specification dialog, 'income' is placed in the 'Independent variables' or 'Regressors' box.

task_completion.description: The OLS regression results are successfully generated and displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Gretl model output window is visible, showing the OLS estimates, coefficients for 'income', standard errors, and R-squared values.

task_completion.description: The regression results are exported to the specified text file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save as' or export dialog showing the path '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/ols_results.txt', OR a file manager, terminal, or text editor confirming the file 'ols_results.txt' exists in the '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Gretl graphical interface to perform the regression.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Gretl menus and dialog boxes, rather than terminal commands executing external scripts to bypass the application.

integrity.description: The exported results contain actual Gretl regression output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The contents of the model window or the saved text file display a structured econometric table (with columns for coefficient, std. error, t-ratio, p-value), not manually typed placeholder text.

integrity.description: The regression is run on the correct 'food.gdt' dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: The main Gretl window displays 'food.gdt' in its title bar or dataset information panel.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Dataset: food.gdt (Hill, Griffiths, Lim - Principles of Econometrics 5th ed). Dependent variable: food_exp. Regressor: income. Expected output file: /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/ols_results.txt.
